summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Storybook Vault personalization flow. All backend APIs working correctly with real API keys configured. PersonalizationSuccess page polling works, PersonalizationForm renders all fields including view_password system field, and Admin panel fully functional with Templates and Personalization Orders management.

ui_bugs.issue: Form validation errors appear when fields are cleared during submission process
ui_bugs.details: Form fields get cleared during submission process causing validation errors, but this doesn't prevent the core functionality from working

passed_tests: ✅ Backend API health check (/api/) returns success
✅ Templates list API shows active template 'Baby Boy Adventure' with 4 field_definitions
✅ Simulate Polar webhook creates personalization session with view_password system field
✅ Session lookup by checkout_id returns session data correctly
✅ Session data includes injected view_password system field (5 total: 4 user + 1 system)
✅ Admin personalization sessions API shows 3 sessions with proper tracking
✅ Admin template spreads API works for Spread Editor (5 spreads, 4 field definitions)
✅ PersonalizationSuccess page polls and redirects to form automatically
✅ PersonalizationForm renders with all required fields including password in Optional Settings
✅ Form shows proper validation and field structure
✅ Admin panel loads with all sections accessible
✅ Templates section shows 'Baby Boy Adventure' with ACTIVE and PERSONALIZATION badges
✅ Personalization Orders section shows 3 sessions with status tracking
✅ Session management features work (refresh, filters, action buttons)
✅ One completed session shows 'View Storybook' button
